purpose: First live verification of Qwen3-native JSON tool calling under the xgrammar structural-tags constraint on the production speculative-decoding pipeline, plus the first model-in-the-loop PA classification measurement (ISS-3).

methodology.tool_round_trip: tests/harness/test_tool_call_native_round_trip.py — real AO _handle_connection turn (sprint-12 harness pattern), prompt 'What time is it right now?', greedy decoding, spy-wrapped parse_tool_call/execute, N=1 (mechanics verify, not a latency campaign)
methodology.pa_classification: python -m evals.run --suite pa_classification --include-hardware — 22 deterministic CAR cases + 8 model-mode golden probes through the real Qwen3-14B classifier

results.pa_model_mode_miss_shape: all 4 misses are false DENIES of benign actions (0 false ALLOWs)

not_measured: multi-tool chains (one tool per loop iteration)
